mnemonics: CIE: Continuously Implement Everything (to solidify knowledge of data structures)
Module 5's CIE: Code, Implement, Evaluate (the core cycle of learning data structures)
keyPoints: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) is an ongoing assessment method used throughout Module 5.
Its purpose is to gauge practical understanding and application of data structure concepts, not just theoretical knowledge.
CIE often involves regular assignments, quizzes, or small projects focused on implementing and analyzing data structures.
commonMistakes: Procrastinating on CIE tasks, as they are cumulative and build foundational knowledge essential for later modules.
Focusing only on theory and neglecting the hands-on coding practice that CIE is designed to evaluate.
Underestimating the weight of CIE assignments on the final grade, considering them less important than a single final exam.
